name: MFA Lockout Cascade
description: Triggered by Wazuh rule 100003 (Keycloak brute force - 5 failures in 120 seconds). Disables Keycloak user, creates TheHive case, notifies analyst.

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.description: Receives Wazuh Keycloak brute force alert

nodes.name: Extract username and source IP
nodes.description: Parse userId and srcip from alert data

nodes.name: Disable Keycloak User
nodes.description: Set enabled=false on the targeted Keycloak account

nodes.name: Create TheHive Alert
nodes.description: Create case with brute force details and containment action taken

body.title: Keycloak Brute Force: ${username} targeted from ${src_ip}

nodes.name: Slack Notification
nodes.description: Notify SOC analyst of automated containment

body.text:
MFA BRUTE FORCE CONTAINED
User ${username} disabled in Keycloak.
Source IP: ${src_ip}
TheHive case created. Review and re-enable if false positive.
